refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation link availability at or above the customer-defined target throughout the operational period.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR to explicitly state the performance metric (link availability) and the operational context ensures clarity and testability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure link uptime statistics over the evaluation period and compare against the customer-defined availability target.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor teleoperation link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and recover from link failures promptly.
FR3: Maintain network infrastructure reliability to support link availability.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement redundant network communication paths.
DP2: Use adaptive link quality monitoring and dynamic rerouting.
DP3: Employ error correction and link recovery protocols.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement redundant network communication paths.

potential_sources: Interaction with safety services for failover
coupling_check.notes: Redundancy reduces coupling by isolating failure points; however, coordination with Safety Services is necessary to ensure safe failover.

assumptions_risks: Risk of increased complexity leading to maintenance challenges.
Risk that redundancy alone may not meet availability if recovery is slow.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating adaptive monitoring (DP2) in future refinement to enhance robustness.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Responsible for managing teleoperation communication links and ensuring link availability.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Physical and logical network connections used for teleoperation data exchange.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Status and health data of the teleoperation link sent to NGHE Solution.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Receives safety alerts from Safety Services to trigger safe link failover.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as link management is core to Teleoperation; low diffusion risk.
Moderate containment but higher diffusion risk due to broad system scope.
Low containment; link availability logic less relevant here.
Supports safety alerts but not primary for link availability.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing link availability management within Teleoperation module minimizes diffusion and improves maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential dependency on Safety Services for safe failover coordination.
Risk of interface complexity with NGHE Solution for telemetry data.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts with Safety Services and NGHE Solution to mitigate integration risks.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP (redundant network paths) directly addresses the refined FR sub-functions and supports high availability.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk as DP is well contained within Teleoperation module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support assignment to Teleoperation; interfaces are well defined.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry data and link availability statistics is feasible within Teleoperation module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of responsibility for link availability to Teleoperation module.

recommended_revisions: Enhance coordination protocols with Safety Services for failover scenarios.
Plan for future integration of adaptive monitoring DP to improve robustness.

decision.justification: While the current decomposition and assignments are sound, incorporating adaptive monitoring and recovery mechanisms will strengthen the solution and address residual risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor teleoperation link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and recover from link failures promptly.
FR3: Maintain network infrastructure reliability to support link availability.

revise.why: To include adaptive link quality monitoring and dynamic rerouting to complement redundancy and improve availability.

assumptions: Safety Services will provide timely alerts for failover.
evidence_needed: Performance data on link availability with redundancy.
Verification of interface reliability between Teleoperation and Safety Services.
